info.name: Educational ERP System API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Educational ERP System built with Laravel 11 and React

item.name: Get Attendance by Class and Date

body.raw:
{
  "institution_id": 2,
  "academic_year_id": 2,
  "name": "Mid Term Exam",
  "type": "mid_term",
  "start_date": "2024-06-01",
  "end_date": "2024-06-15",
  "description": "Mid term examination for all classes",
  "instructions": "Bring your ID card and stationery"
}

item.name: Get Study Materials by Class and Subject

body.raw:
{
  "recipient_ids": [7, 9],
  "subject": "Test Message",
  "message": "This is a test message for students",
  "message_type": "general",
  "priority": "normal"
}
